name: BlueOrchard Finance
description: Leading global impact investment manager founded in 2001 as the first commercial manager of micro‑finance debt investments. Provides debt and equity financing to institutions in emerging and frontier markets and manages collective investment schemes.
website_content:
## Important Notice
We are delighted that you are interested in BlueOrchard Finance Ltd’s investment products.
Please select your country of domicile/registration and your investor type. These settings affect the products that will be shown to you in accordance with regulatory requirements.
This page is currently not available for your investor type or in your jurisdiction. You can [contact us for further information.](https://www.blueorchard.com/contact/)

This field is required
**Private Client***
You are likely to be a**Private Client** if you do not qualify as an Institutional Client as defined below. However, if you are an experienced investor or high net worth, you may (upon request and careful consideration) be eligible for treatment similar to that of an institutional client.
**Institutional Client***
You are likely to be an**Institutional Client** if you are:
1. an entity required, under the laws of the jurisdiction in which you carry on business, to be authorized or regulated to operate in the financial markets (which includes but is not limited to financial intermediaries such as: banks, investment firms, broker dealers, insurance companies, insurance intermediaries, funds, pension funds or management companies);
2. a large undertaking (the term ‘undertaking’ includes corporates, partnerships and unincorporated associations);
3. a national government, central bank, international or supranational institution;
4. a regional government, sub-national organization or state-owned agency that manages public debt; or
5. an institutional investor whose main activity is to invest in financial instruments, which includes entities dedicated to the securitization of assets or other financing transactions.
The term **Institutional Client** in particular covers professional clients in terms of MiFID and AIFMD or equivalent rules outside the EU, certain investors deemed to be professional investors based on local law (such as “well informed investors” in Luxembourg).
*If you are a Singapore resident, please note that by proceeding to access our website, you are further representing and warranting that you are (i) an **institutional investor** under Section 4A(C) of the Singapore Securities and Futures Act 2001 (“SFA”), and (ii) acting in compliance with the laws, rules and regulations applicable to you. You further acknowledge that (i) BlueOrchard Finance Ltd and its affiliates (including BlueOrchard Investments (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.) are not regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (“MAS”) and are therefore only permitted to offer their products to Singapore residents pursuant to the institutional investor exemption under Section 304 of the SFA, and (ii) this website has not been reviewed by the MAS.
**Qualified Investor***
You are likely to be a Qualified Investor if you are:
1. a regulated financial intermediary such as a bank, a securities firm, a portfolio manager, a trustee, a fund management company or and an asset manager of collective investment schemes or an insurance company;
2. a central bank, a public entity with professional treasury operations, a national or supranational public entity with professional treasury operations
3. an occupational pension scheme with a professional treasury operations or other occupational pension institution providing professional treasury operations;
4. a company or a private investment structure with professional treasury operations for HNW private clients;
5. a large company exceeding two of the following parameters: (a) balance sheet total of CHF 20 million; (b) turnover of CHF 40 million; equity of CHF 2 million;
6. a private client who has concluded a permanent asset management agreement or a permanent advisory agreement in writing with a financial intermediary or an independent asset manager pursuant to Swiss law.
The term **Qualified Investor** pursuant to CISA covers in particular professional clients and institutional clients in terms of the Swiss Financial Services Act (FINSA).
Are those settings correct ?

# Home
[Products](https://www.blueorchard.com/products/)
## Impact pioneer and leader
We are impact investment pioneers with an unprecedented 20+ year track record, a global reach of over 300 million people, and the largest commercial microfinance fund in the world. Our goal? Combining social and environmental impact with a positive financial return.
## Trusted
partner
We are a trusted investment partner for sophisticated investors and global initiatives who fight inequality and the effects of climate change. A member of the Schroders Group, we have invested long-term in more than 100 emerging and frontier markets through a network of over 750 financial institutions.
## Expertise and track record
We are a proven investment platform with local experts, two decades of experience, and outstanding knowledge of a range of asset classes. Our bespoke impact management frameworks and standards are also always kept up-to-date with industry best practice.
## Impact Guide
Interested in making a difference through impact investing? Start here. We will guide you through several approaches – as well as answering several key questions for any impact-oriented portfolio.
[Start now](https://www.blueorchard.com/impact/impact-guide/)
## Impact Report
Empowering people, protecting our planet – that is the key focus of our BlueOrchard Impact Footprint. Find out more about the impact we have and the people we have supported.
[Read here](https://www.blueorchard.com/impact/impact-report/)

tavily.answer:
BlueOrchard's official website is www.blueorchard.com. It focuses on impact investing and has offices worldwide. Founded in 2001, it manages over $4 billion in assets.
BlueOrchard Finance is a global impact investment manager founded in 2001, managing over $4 billion in assets, and focused on sustainable financial solutions. It was selected by British International Investment for a climate finance initiative. The firm operates in financial services and investment management sectors.
BlueOrchard Finance, founded in 2001, is a global impact investment manager focused on microfinance and sustainable finance. It manages over $4 billion in assets and specializes in blended finance. The firm is a member of the Schroders Group.
BlueOrchard Finance Ltd is a global impact investment manager founded in 2001, dedicated to generating positive social and environmental impact while delivering financial returns. It manages the largest microfinance fund and offers diverse investment solutions. As of 2026, it has over $4 billion in assets under management.
BlueOrchard is a global impact investment manager founded in 2001, specializing in microfinance and sustainable growth, with over $4 billion in assets under management. It focuses on generating positive social and environmental impact alongside financial returns. The firm operates in multiple countries worldwide.
